name: Diana

base_stats.notable: Lower Expedition multiplier (110.08% vs other Epics' 140.11%) — reflects gathering specialization.

conquest.name: Incendiary Arrows
conquest.description: Fires an Incendiary Shot dealing damage to the target and splash damage to nearby enemies.

expedition.name: Iron Constitution
expedition.description: The unique arts of the wilderness rangers reduce Governor Stamina Cost.
expedition.notable: Unique gathering utility — reduces stamina consumption for marches and events.

expedition.name: Quick Paced
expedition.description: Increases March Speed and Rally March Speed against Beasts and Terrors.
expedition.notable: +100% march speed at max level against PvE targets.

exclusive_gear_note: Epic heroes do not have exclusive gear.

order: Max Iron Constitution (stamina reduction) FIRST for farm
Then Quick Paced for PvE march speed

sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)
gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard archer archetype at epic tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).

named_pairs.note: Diana provides universal stamina reduction, pair with resource-specific R-grade gatherers

best_partners.theoretical_synergy: Gathering specialist. Used on farm accounts for resource march speed and stamina reduction. Not a combat hero despite having Conquest skills.
best_partners.source: kingshothandbook.com effect_op stacking math + community lineup guides

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

f2p_investment.reasoning: F2P-accessible. Valuable specifically for farm accounts, not primary combat.

lore_background.title: The Red-Haired Wilderness Ranger
lore_background.backstory: Diana is the youngest member of the wilderness rangers cavalry group — known for her dashing red hair, good looks, and steely-cold exterior. She was discovered as an infant during a ranger expedition and raised among them, developing exceptional warrior abilities while internalizing the ranger tenets: freedom, non-oppression, and loyalty.

deep_analysis: Diana is the gathering specialist of the Kingshot roster — a Gen 1 Epic Archer whose value is outside direct combat. While she DOES have Conquest skills (Incendiary Arrows for up to 290% target damage, Sharpshooter, Deadly Strike), her defining utility is her Expedition tree: Iron Constitution reduces Governor Stamina Cost by up to 20%, and Quick Paced increases March Speed by up to +100% against Beasts and Terrors — dramatically accelerating resource gathering and PvE content. Her Expedition scaling (110.08%) is lower than other Epics (140.11%), reflecting her specialization. heroes.js marks her as 'gathering only' with zero combat value — though this slightly understates her Conquest skills, the practical use case is farm accounts and stamina-efficient resource collection. No exclusive gear (Epic pattern). F2P via Epic General Hero Shard and Desert Trial. Lore: youngest of the wilderness rangers, discovered as an infant on a ranger expedition, raised to embody the rangers' creed of freedom, non-oppression, and loyalty.
unverified_fields: heroes.js 'no battle skills' note conflicts with kingshotwiki's Conquest skill list — resolved: she has combat skills but is specialized for gathering
skill_priority, gear_build, named_pairs, counters, shard_cost — all null

effect_op_codes.description: Gathering specialist — no rally/battle effect_op code (not a combat joiner)
